title: Palimbang Heavy Rain
lead: Palimbang is experiencing a critical heavy rain event with a Z-Score of +3.03. The Score is 10.0/10, indicating extreme weather conditions.
body:
The current weather conditions in Palimbang are characterized by heavy rain and high humidity, with an Umidita of 95%. 
 The wind speed is relatively low at 5.8 km/h, which may exacerbate the flooding. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG and CDD is 9.6 GG, indicating a significant impact on the city's climate.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heavy rain.
